result.description:
Located in Contra Costa County, family owned and operated for over 15 years. El Cerrito Honda is the East Bay’s one-stop Honda shop. We offer a range of automotive services, from new and used models, to top-notch service and expert customization options. Whether you’re in the market for a new or used vehicle, looking for exceptional service, or ready to customize, at El Cerrito Honda you’re guaranteed the selection, service, and support you need. Conveniently located at 11755 San Pablo Ave. El Cerrito, CA and a short drive from Concord, Oakland, and Walnut Creek we’re here to help you drive away in the Honda of your dreams.

Convenience

  • This intelligent cruise control system uses laser or radar to maintain a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking or accelerating as required.

Safety and Security

  • The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision.
  • The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian.
  • The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display.
  • An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane.
  • Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.

Technology and Telematics

  • Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle.

When shopping for your next Chevy car, truck, or SUV, no other dealership in the Columbia area gives you peace of mind like Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick. That’s because when you buy a qualifying new Chevy, you’ll receive Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty! This exclusive warranty covers your new Chevy’s powertrain for as long as you own the vehicle, ensuring you receive a reliable model and certified service on the Petal roads. Learn more about our Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty and what’s covered on your vehicle with the team at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick below. How the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty Works Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty is simple. When you purchase a qualifying new Chevy model at our Hattiesburg dealership, your vehicle’s powertrain components are covered for the entire duration of your ownership with a flat repair cost of $100. To keep an eye on your vehicle’s health and functionality, we require that all recommended Chevy service intervals are followed and that your car is exclusively serviced at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick’s certified service department. This allows our technicians to monitor all your covered components, watching for wear, tear, and breakage before it becomes an issue on the Laurel roads. What’s Covered in the Lifetime Powertrain Warranty? The Lifetime Powertrain Warranty at Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick covers a wide range of components, from the inner workings of your engine to vital parts of your drivetrain assembly. Explore all the covered components of the Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Chevrolet Lifetime Powertrain Warranty below: Engine:* Pistons & Piston Rings Crankshaft & Main Bearings Connecting Rods & Rod Bearings Camshaft & Camshaft Bearings Timing Gears & Timing Chain Valves Valve Springs Guides Oil Pump Rocker Arms Push Rods Hydraulic Lifters Rocker Arm Shaft Cylinder Heads Transmission:** Bearings Bushings Gear Shafts Clutch Plates & Drums Oil Pumps Servo Units Rings Governor Torus Unit Torque Converter & Valves All Internal Gears Drive Axle Assembly & Drive Shaft:*** Rear Gear & Pinion Gear Bushings Bearings Spacers Spider Gears Axle Gears & Shafts Drive Shaft Universal & Constant Velocity Joints Transfer Case (4×4 Vehicles):**** All Internal Components Get Started With Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick Today! Whether you’re interested in a new powerful Chevy Silverado 1500 pickup or the fuel-efficient Chevy Trax, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick has you covered for life! For more details about our Lifetime Powertrain Warranty, contact us online or at (800) 578-7871. No matter what new Chevy has sparked your interest, Pine Belt Chevrolet Buick is here to put you behind the wheel with comprehensive coverage and confidence! Disclaimers: * The engine block and cylinder walls and sleeves are also covered if the mechanical failure is the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. **No coverage is provided for any electrical component pertaining to the operation of any transmission. *The transmission case on both standard and automatic transmissions are also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. The odometer driven gear, manual transmission clutch disc, pressure plate, clutch release bearing and pilot bearing are not covered at any time or for any reason. ***The drive axle assembly housing and drive shaft housing are covered if their mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy. ****The transfer case housing is also covered if mechanical failure was the direct result of the failure of a part covered by this policy.

The 2017 Nissan Altima 2.5 SR is a seductively stylish sedan that boasts an impressive 4 Cylinder Engine and Front Wheel Drive for a truly exhilarating driving experience. With a sleek Super Black exterior and a luxurious Sport Interior, this vehicle exudes elegance and sophistication. Its 41,900 miles ensure that you'll have endless adventures ahead, making every journey in this Nissan Altima an unforgettable one. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:

Midnight Edition Package ($990 value)

  • Black Mirror Caps
  • LED Headlamps with Signature
  • Remote Engine Start
  • 18 Exclusive Midnight Black Wheels
  • Black Spoiler

Splash Guards ($190 value)

  • Includes front and rear splash guards.

Body Side Molding ($215 value)

Chrome Rear Bumper Protector ($100 value)

    Midnight Edition Floor and Cargo Mats ($235 value)

    • Includes midnight edition front, rear, and cargo mats.

    Convenience

    • Cruise control maintains a preset vehicle speed; automatically increasing or decreasing throttle to maintain that speed.

    Safety and Security

    • The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display.
    • Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.

result.description:
Kyle Sagnella is one of the coolest guys you'll ever meet. He's always the life of the party, with his infectious energy and positive attitude. Not to mention, he's got impeccable taste when it comes to cars. Just take a look at his latest ride, a sleek vehicle decked out in Alpine White with black 19 wheels. But the cherry on top is definitely the Executive Package, valued at $4,000.

This package includes luxurious features like Soft-Close Automatic Doors, Power Rear Sunshade and Rear Side Window Shades, Front Ventilated Seats, Front and Rear Heated Seats, 4-Zone Automatic Climate Control, Front Massaging Seats, Parking Assistant Plus, Wireless Charging, Active Park Distance Control, Rear View Camera, and Surround View with 3D View. With all of these added touches, Kyle's ride is not only stylish on the outside, but incredibly comfortable and convenient on the inside.

And let's not forget about the M Carbon Ceramic Brakes, ensuring top-notch performance and stopping power. Paired with the Full Merino Leather Upholstery, this car is the epitome of luxury and sophistication. Kyle Sagnella truly knows how to roll in style.
